summary: P1 Gaming Modules (Resource Alchemy, Gravity Well Exchange, Cryptic Quest Nodes) - Backend APIs 100% working, Frontend has token persistence issue preventing data display

ui_bugs.issue: Pages load but show empty content - authHeaders was being called as function instead of object
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - changed authHeaders() to authHeaders in all 3 files

integration_issues.issue: Token stored in localStorage after login but cleared when navigating to gaming pages. This is a pre-existing app-wide auth issue, not specific to P1 Gaming modules.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix token persistence issue - localStorage.getItem('zen_token') returns null after navigation even though token was stored
Investigate what is clearing localStorage on route changes (possibly in AuthContext or a global component)
The authHeaders() -> authHeaders fix has been applied to all 3 gaming pages
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: ResourceAlchemy.js, GravityWellExchange.js, CrypticQuestNodes.js were calling authHeaders() as a function but AuthContext exports authHeaders as a memoized object
Token persistence bug: Token is stored after login but cleared on navigation - this affects all authenticated pages, not just gaming modules
Backend gaming routes are well-structured with proper validation, dust rewards, and inventory management

success_rate.frontend: 0% (pages load but no data due to token persistence issue)

seed_data_creation: None - backend auto-creates initial inventory {iron: 10, copper: 5}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend P1 Gaming APIs fully working. Frontend fix applied (authHeaders() -> authHeaders). Main blocker is app-wide token persistence issue - token gets cleared from localStorage on navigation. This is NOT specific to gaming modules.

Gravity Well Exchange.GET /api/gaming/gravity-well/market: PASS - returns 7 elements with Phi-weighted prices

Cryptic Quest Nodes.GET /api/gaming/quest/nodes: PASS - returns 5 nodes with solved/locked status

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Two issues: 1) Frontend pages were calling authHeaders() as function but AuthContext exports it as object. 2) App-wide token persistence bug - localStorage token cleared on navigation.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Fixed authHeaders() -> authHeaders in 3 gaming pages. Token persistence issue requires investigation of AuthContext and route change handlers.
